console.log(await Chats.paused()); // Should print "false"
await Chats.connect(owner).unpause();
console.log(deployedCode.length > 2 ? "Contract Deployed" : "Contract Not Deployed");
const deployedCode = await ethers.provider.getCode(Chats.address);
console.log(await Chats.functions);
console.log(await Chats.paused()); // Should print "true"
await Chats.connect(owner).pause();
await Chats.connect(owner).mint(1000, "0xYourTestAddress");
console.log(owner.address === await Chats.owner()); // Should print "true"
const [owner] = await ethers.getSigners();
console.log(await Chats.owner()); 
const Chats = await ethers.getContractAt("Chats", "0x59d3631c86BbE35EF041872d502F218A39FBa150", signer);
const [signer] = await ethers.getSigners();

const chatCount = await Chats.getChatCount();

const Chats = await ethers.getContractAt("Chats", "0x59d3631c86BbE35EF041872d502F218A39FBa150");
await Chats.createChat("Hello, blockchain!");
const Chats = await ethers.getContractAt("Chats", "0x59d3631c86BbE35EF041872d502F218A39FBa150");
console.log("📌 Updated User's Funded Amount:", ethers.utils.formatEther(updatedFundAmount));
const updatedFundAmount = await escrow.getFundAmount(userSigner.address);
console.log("✅ User successfully withdrew 0.5 MATIC.");
await escrow.connect(userSigner).withdrawFunds(ethers.utils.parseEther("0.5"));
console.log("📌 Is withdrawal approved?:", isApproved);
const isApproved = await escrow.WithdrawalApprovalStatus(userSigner.address);
console.log("✅ Withdrawal approved for user!");
await escrow.adminSignatory(userSigner.address);
console.log("📌 Can user withdraw funds?:", isAvailable);
const isAvailable = await escrow.getFundAvailability(userSigner.address);
console.log("📌 User's Funded Amount:", ethers.utils.formatEther(fundAmount));
const fundAmount = await escrow.getFundAmount(userSigner.address);
console.log("✅ User successfully funded 1 MATIC.");
await escrow.connect(userSigner).fundCampaignMatic({ value: ethers.utils.parseEther("1") });
console.log("✅ User Address:", userSigner.address);
